tool_input.prompt:
Redesign 5 pages of RestauMargin to monochrome theme. Project at C:\Users\mrgue\CLAUDE CODE\restaurant-margin.

**Do ALL 5 files. Read each one first:**
- client/src/pages/AIAssistant.tsx
- client/src/pages/HACCP.tsx
- client/src/pages/MenuBuilder.tsx
- client/src/pages/MenuEngineering.tsx
- client/src/pages/Mercuriale.tsx

**For EACH file, use replace_all=true to replace ALL occurrences of these patterns:**

1. `bg-slate-900` â†’ `bg-white dark:bg-black`
2. `bg-slate-800` â†’ `bg-[#FAFAFA] dark:bg-[#0A0A0A]`
3. `bg-slate-950` â†’ `bg-white dark:bg-black`
4. `bg-slate-700` â†’ `bg-[#F3F4F6] dark:bg-[#171717]`
5. `border-slate-700` â†’ `border-[#E5E7EB] dark:border-[#1A1A1A]`
6. `border-slate-800` â†’ `border-[#E5E7EB] dark:border-[#1A1A1A]`
7. `border-slate-600` â†’ `border-[#E5E7EB] dark:border-[#1A1A1A]`
8. `text-slate-400` â†’ `text-[#9CA3AF] dark:text-[#737373]`
9. `text-slate-300` â†’ `text-[#6B7280] dark:text-[#A3A3A3]`
10. `text-slate-500` â†’ `text-[#6B7280] dark:text-[#A3A3A3]`
11. `text-slate-100` â†’ `text-[#111111] dark:text-white`
12. `text-slate-200` â†’ `text-[#111111] dark:text-white`
13. `hover:bg-slate-700` â†’ `hover:bg-[#F3F4F6] dark:hover:bg-[#171717]`
14. `hover:bg-slate-800` â†’ `hover:bg-[#F3F4F6] dark:hover:bg-[#171717]`
15. `bg-teal-600` â†’ `bg-[#111111] dark:bg-white`
16. `hover:bg-teal-500` â†’ `hover:bg-[#333] dark:hover:bg-[#E5E5E5]`
17. `hover:bg-teal-700` â†’ `hover:bg-[#333] dark:hover:bg-[#E5E5E5]`
18. `divide-slate-700` â†’ `divide-[#E5E7EB] dark:divide-[#1A1A1A]`
19. `divide-slate-800` â†’ `divide-[#E5E7EB] dark:divide-[#1A1A1A]`
20. `placeholder-slate-400` â†’ `placeholder-[#9CA3AF] dark:placeholder-[#737373]`
21. `placeholder-slate-500` â†’ `placeholder-[#9CA3AF] dark:placeholder-[#737373]`
22. `ring-teal-500` â†’ `ring-[#111111] dark:ring-white`

Also fix any `text-white` that's used for body text/headings (not on colored buttons) â†’ `text-[#111111] dark:text-white`. Be careful: keep `text-white` on buttons that have colored backgrounds like `bg-red-600`, `bg-emerald-500`, etc.

After ALL replacements, verify zero `slate-` classes remain in each file (except `bg-slate-50` or `bg-slate-100` which are light mode only and OK to keep).

DO NOT change structure, logic, or imports.

file.content:
{showLotForm && (

{t('haccp.recordLot')}

setLotForm(f => ({ ...f, lotNumber: e.target.value }))} placeholder="LOT-XXXX" className="w-full bg-slate-800 border border-slate-700 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 text-sm text-white placeholder:text-slate-500" />
setLotForm(f => ({ ...f, product: e.target.value }))} placeholder={t('haccp.productName')} className="w-full bg-slate-800 border border-slate-700 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 text-sm text-white placeholder:text-slate-500" />
setLotForm(f => ({ ...f, supplier: e.target.value }))} placeholder={t('haccp.supplier')} className="w-full bg-slate-800 border border-slate-700 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 text-sm text-white placeholder:text-slate-500" />
setLotForm(f => ({ ...f, dlc: e.target.value }))} className="w-full bg-slate-800 border border-slate-700 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 text-sm text-white" />
setLotForm(f => ({ ...f, ddm: e.target.value }))} className="w-full bg-slate-800 border border-slate-700 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 text-sm text-white" />
)}
{filteredLots.map(l => ( ))}
{t('haccp.lotNumber')}{t('haccp.product')}{t('haccp.supplier')}{t('haccp.reception')}{t('haccp.dlc')}{t('haccp.ddm')}{t('haccp.status')}
{l.lotNumber} {l.product} {l.supplier} {new Date(l.receptionDate).toLocaleDateString('fr-FR')} {l.dlc ? new Date(l.dlc).toLocaleDateString('fr-FR') : '-'} {l.ddm ? new Date(l.ddm).toLocaleDateString('fr-FR') : '-'} {STATUS_LABELS[l.status]}
{filteredLots.length === 0 &&
{t('haccp.noLotsFound')}
}
)} {/* â•�â•�â•� ALERTES DLUO â•�â•�â•� */} {activeTab === 'alertes' && (

{t('haccp.legend')}

{t('haccp.expiredOrD1')}
{t('haccp.d2ToD3')}
{t('haccp.d4Plus')}
{dluoAlerts.map(a => (

{a.product}

{a.lotNumber}

{getDluoLabel(a.daysRemaining)}
{t('haccp.dlc')}{new Date(a.dlc).toLocaleDateString('fr-FR')}
{t('haccp.quantity')}{a.quantity}
{a.daysRemaining <= 1 && (
{a.daysRemaining <= 0 ? t('haccp.expiredRemoveNow') : t('haccp.consumeOrRemoveToday')}
)}
))}
)} {/* â•�â•�â•� NETTOYAGE â•�â•�â•� */} {activeTab === 'nettoyage' && (

{t('haccp.cleaningRegistry')} â€” {new Date().toLocaleDateString('fr-FR')}

{cleaning.filter(c => c.verified).length}/{cleaning.length} zones
{cleaning.map(c => ( ))}
{t('haccp.done')}{t('haccp.zone')}{t('haccp.time')}{t('haccp.agent')}{t('haccp.status')}
{c.zone} {c.time || '-'} {c.agent || '-'} {c.verified ? {t('haccp.cleaned')} : {t('haccp.pending')}}
)}
); }
